message:
🐛 fix: address Copilot review on github-pipelines + restore ratchet (#8417, #8422) (#8427)

* 🐛 fix: address Copilot review on github-pipelines + restore ratchet

- Validate job/run query params are numeric (prevent path injection)
- Cap job log reads at 10 MB via io.LimitReader
- Use workflow-specific endpoint for pulse (not /actions/runs)
- Fix cacheKey missing default "pulse" for empty view param
- Return 400 (not 502) for client validation errors in serveCached
- Use UTC for date trimming and matrix range (not local timezone)
- Extract STANDARD_CRON_FIELD_COUNT constant (fixes ratchet regression)

Fixes #8422
Fixes #8417

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: guard nil releaseRuns from fetchWorkflowRuns (nilaway)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
